section_miscategorizations.reason: This conflicts with the immediately following statement that he is currently taking Eliquis (a blood thinner). While each individual statement belongs in S, the contradictory documentation could mislead a reader about anticoagulant use. This is more a content inconsistency than a section error, so only a minor organizational concern.

section_miscategorizations.text: I will order a cervical x-ray 6421.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The same cervical x‑ray is already documented as completed in the Objective section. Re‑stating it as a new order in the Plan is internally inconsistent and could confuse timing, but it is still the correct section type for an order. This is a content/timing issue rather than a true section miscategorization.
